{

    "excessive tool wear",

    "insufficient tool replacement schedule"

  "evidence": [
    "product L50446 variant L was damaged",
    "tool wear was at 195.0 minutes",
    "torque was reading 56.8 Nm",
    "rotational speed was at 1269.0 rpm"
  ],
  "recommended_actions": [
    "immediately replace the tool",
    "review and adjust tool maintenance schedule",
    "consider implementing a more robust tool inspection process"
  ],
  "confidence": 0.8,
  "final_report": "A high-severity mechanical issue was encountered on the L line, resulting in damaged product and excessive tool wear. The likely causes include inadequate tool maintenance and insufficient tool replacement schedule. Immediate replacement of the tool and review of the maintenance schedule are recommended."
}
